archiveLayoutNote: Each archive contains a single flat `opencode` executable at the top level (no bin/ wrapper). Both install.sh and postinstall.js extract to a staging dir then relocate to <version_dir>/bin/opencode.
comment: Pinned opencode version bundled with skvm (see plan §1.8). Keep in sync with the OPENCODE_VERSION constants in install/install.sh and install/postinstall.js. Upstream repo was sst/opencode; GitHub now redirects to anomalyco/opencode (ownership transferred). When bumping, download each asset, verify with `shasum -a 256`, update sha256[] accordingly.
